content_body:
Two towns, two states, two rivers...McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN, are twin mountain towns on the Toccoa River/Ocoee River. Fun shopping and dining on the river ~ great photo opp to stand in two states at once! 

Running through the two mountain towns of McCaysville, GA, and Copperhill, TN, just 9 miles north of Blue Ridge, GA, you will discover that the Toccoa River turns into the Ocoee River. One of the only rivers traversing northwards is the Toccoa River in Blue Ridge, GA, which flows by our Toccoa River luxury cabin rentals.

Experience unique boutiques, coffee shops, microbreweries, and restaurants along the river, giving a cool vibe to this unique mountain community. Spend a day and a night exploring fun things to do. Explore the Riverwalk shops, learn mountain herbal medicine at the Folk Collaborative, sip a brew with the locals at Buck Bald Brewing, find adventure whitewater rafting at Rolling Thunder River Company, or hang out and spend the day out at Horseshoe Bend Park playing volleyball, picnicking, playing in the Toccoa River.
title: Twin Mountain Towns: McCaysville, GA/Copperhill, TN
